trivia: The best-selling Boeing airliner of all time: nearly five thousand built, and for two decades the default airplane of global short-haul. If your station hears jets at all, it hears -800s.
Blended winglets on most airframes and that unmistakable flat-bottomed CFM56 nacelle, squashed to clear the 737's low stance.
funFacts: Close to 5,000 were delivered, a single-type record.
Also serves as the P-8 Poseidon's airframe basis.
